research_gaps.description: A single cross-sectional observational study on reading eye-tracking in ADHD provides no comparative or convergent evidence. Key gaps include absence of longitudinal tracking of eye movement patterns, lack of intervention studies targeting reading-related eye movement abnormalities, and no comparison with other ADHD assessment modalities.
research_gaps.evidence: Only one KnowledgeItem available (10.1007/s00787-023-01872-2). No comparative, contradictory, or evolutionary associations can be formed due to insufficient knowledge items for pairwise analysis.
